name: language-pack
description: Manages UI and AI agent output languages as installable extensions. Built-in languages (en, ja, zh, ko, pt, tr) are bundled but only the installer-selected language is active by default. Additional languages can be installed from the marketplace.
author: Zero-Employee Orchestrator Team

capabilities.dynamic_loading: Load language packs at runtime without rebuild
capabilities.restart_on_change: Some language changes require app restart for full effect

note: Language affects both UI display and AI agent output. After changing language, some features may require restart to fully apply.
